basics.name: Yingyue Cao
basics.summary: Currently employed at University of Alberta. Short biography for the left-hand sidebar

publications.name: The evolving landscape of llm-and vlm-integrated reinforcement learning
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the Thirty-Fourth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence, {IJCAI-25}
publications.summary: Surveyed recent work on integrating LLMs and VLMs with reinforcement learning, with emphasis on reward shaping, hierarchical planning, and multimodal decision-making.

publications.name: LaFFi: Leveraging Hybrid Natural Language Feedback for Fine-tuning Language Models
publications.publisher: Proceedings of Human-Centric Representation Learning workshop of AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, {AAAI-24}
publications.summary: This paper introduces an alternative to SFT called Natural Language Feedback for Finetuning LLMs (LaFFi).

presentations.name: Language Models in Reinforcement Learning: A Survey on Benefits, Challenges, and Opportunities.

teaching.description: Graded quizzes and exams. Led seminars and lab sessions to reinforce course concepts and support programming assignments. Assisted students during office hours with course material and problem solving.

Graded quizzes and exams for large classes while maintaining consistency and timeliness. Led seminars and lab sessions to reinforce course concepts and support programming assignments.Assisted students during office hours with course material and problem solving.
